# Greenlight Approvals

> Greenlight Approvals is a NetSuite-native approval workflow platform built for audit readiness. It provides multi-step approval routing, budget enforcement, delegation controls, and compliance-grade audit trails — all running natively inside NetSuite.

Greenlight Approvals solves a specific problem: most NetSuite approval tools prioritize speed over correctness. They evaluate routing rules once at submission, don't re-evaluate when transactions change, and log approvals to system notes that are difficult to extract for auditors. Greenlight re-evaluates approval chains when amounts or line items change, captures structured audit evidence automatically, and provides controlled override and delegation workflows that satisfy SOX and internal audit requirements.

Built by Greenlight Software LLC, a company founded by Patrick Olson after 8+ years of NetSuite consulting. Based in Wyoming, USA.

## Product Pages

- [Homepage](https://greenlightapprovals.io/): Product overview, features, pricing tiers (Core, Professional, Enterprise), and demo booking
- [Documentation](https://greenlightapprovals.io/docs): Public product documentation covering platform overview, budgeting, and feature guides
- [Pricing](https://greenlightapprovals.io/#pricing): Three tiers — Core ($2,500/mo), Professional ($4,000/mo), and Enterprise (custom)

## Resources

- [What Happens When Your Approval Tool Doesn't Re-Evaluate Rules](https://greenlightapprovals.io/resources/01-approval-re-evaluation/): A case study of 150+ purchase orders misrouted because the approval tool only evaluated rules at submission, not when transaction amounts changed
- [Why "Faster Approvals" Is the Wrong Goal](https://greenlightapprovals.io/resources/02-faster-approvals-wrong-goal/): Why approval workflows should be evaluated on defensibility and audit readiness rather than speed
- [The Real Cost of Approval Workflow Audit Prep](https://greenlightapprovals.io/resources/03-real-cost-audit-prep/): How finance teams spend 40-60 hours per audit cycle manually assembling approval evidence from NetSuite system notes
- [Approval Delegation Done Wrong: The Vacation Problem](https://greenlightapprovals.io/resources/04-delegation-vacation-problem/): How informal delegation workarounds (admin overrides, shared logins) create audit risk and what proper delegation looks like
- [5 Approval Workflow Red Flags Your Auditor Will Find Before You Do](https://greenlightapprovals.io/resources/5-red-flags-approval-workflow/): The five most common structural gaps in NetSuite approval workflows, including post-approval changes, approver concentration, and vacation workarounds
- [When Someone Needs to Break the Approval Chain](https://greenlightapprovals.io/resources/06-breaking-the-approval-chain-blog/): Why overrides are inevitable and how to design approval systems that document exceptions with full audit trails
